airdrops.about: What is Polymarket? Polymarket is the world’s largest decentralized prediction market, built on the Polygon network. Users buy and sell shares on the outcome of real-world events: elections, sports, crypto prices, geopolitics; with prices reflecting crowd-sourced probabilities. There is no house; trades are peer-to-peer, and smart contracts handle settlement automatically in USDC. The platform became a popular source for real-time outcome probability during the 2024 U.S. elections, processing over $3.6 billion in election-related activity. Polymarket raised $70 million in early fundraising from Founders Fund, General Catalyst, Polychain Capital, Dragonfly Capital, and Vitalik Buterin. Intercontinental Exchange, the parent company of the NYSE, invested $2 billion at a $9 billion valuation in October 2025, consolidating Polymarket’s dominance in the prediction market with over 95% market volume. In late 2025, Polymarket began a limited U.S. relaunch after acquiring QCX, a CFTC-registered

airdrops.about: What is SolPump? SolPump is a premier on-chain Solana betting platform that specializes in crash games and betting opportunities using SOL tokens. The platform operates directly on the Solana blockchain, allowing users to connect their personal wallets and place bets without transferring funds to separate gaming accounts. The platform features a Provably Fair system that uses cryptography and third-party input to generate random values, allowing players to verify game outcomes and ensure legitimate operations. SolPump integrates social features through its active chat community, where players can interact, share strategies, and participate in hourly airdrop distributions.

airdrops.about: What Is Hyperliquid? Hyperliquid is a purpose-built Layer 1 blockchain for high-performance DeFi. At its core is the Hyperliquid DEX: a fully on-chain orderbook perpetuals exchange processing roughly 200,000 orders per second with ~0.2s median latency — no off-chain sequencer, zero gas fees. The platform supports perpetual futures, spot trading, and a native token standard with permissionless liquidity provision. The HYPE token powers the entire ecosystem: staking, governance, fee payments, and token burns. The protocol burns HYPE regularly using a portion of generated revenue — a governance vote in early 2026 approved burning approximately $1 billion worth of HYPE, adding deflationary pressure on top of the staking yield. Since its alpha launch in 2023, Hyperliquid has crossed $100 billion in cumulative trading volume and now commands roughly 60% of the total perpetual DEX market.

airdrops.about: What is DAC Quantum Chain? DAC (Quantum Chain) is a Layer 1 blockchain that was built from the ground up with post-quantum cryptography. It calls itself the first quantum-proof, non-inflationary chain. The project focuses on tokenizing real-world assets, decentralized finance (DeFi), AI applications, and safe data validation. The network uses a dual-asset model to keep transaction fees stable and predictable, which is very important for businesses and node operators who need to know what their costs will be. DAC is still in the pre-launch phase, but it has plans for an Inception Testnet and an Interstellar Mainnet.

airdrops.about: What is Fast (Formerly Pi Squared)? Fast is payment infrastructure for programmatic transactions. It lets agents, APIs, merchants, and services request, authorize, send, and settle payments without a human signing off on each one, and it works across both crypto and fiat rails. Payments run in parallel, so agentic payments and micropayments clear at the same time instead of waiting in a single queue. That design gives Fast sub-second finality, fees close to zero, and throughput with no ceiling, which is what an economy full of autonomous agents actually needs. There are no blocks, no miners, and no consensus round to wait on. Every transaction is processed and settled at the same time. The team behind it, Pi² Labs, comes out of formal verification and AI systems, and that background is why finality on Fast is both instant and mathematically provable. Pi Squared raised $12.5 million in seed funding led by Polychain Capital, with ABCDE, Bloccelerate VC, Generative Ventures, Robot Venture
